---
name: Framework Feedback
about: Substantive proposal for the next version of the Innorve Method (v0.2 or beyond)
title: "[FRAMEWORK FEEDBACK] "
labels: framework-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Which framework is this about?

- [ ] IM-01 Skill Architecture Patterns
- [ ] IM-02 Policy-as-Code Methodology
- [ ] IM-03 Evidence-by-Design Framework
- [ ] IM-04 Skill Contract Schema
- [ ] IM-05 Maturity Gate Model
- [ ] IM-06 Capability Graph Thinking
- [ ] IM-07 Tenant-Aware Design
- [ ] IM-08 Multi-Tool Strategy
- [ ] A new framework you're proposing
- [ ] Cross-cutting (multiple frameworks)

## Type of proposal

- [ ] Refine existing framework (clarify scope, sharpen definition)
- [ ] Split framework into two
- [ ] Merge two frameworks
- [ ] Add new framework
- [ ] Deprecate framework
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Context

What real-world experience or evidence motivates this proposal?

## The proposal

Describe the change in detail.

## Why this is needed

What can't be done with the current Method that this would enable?

## Backward compatibility

Will this break existing IM-XX references? If yes, what's the migration path?

## Alternatives considered

What other framings did you think about?

## References

Cite any production case studies, papers, regulations, or canonical books that support this proposal.
